label: 1. Build yearly concept space
explanation: Extract concept units and embed them in a year-specific semantic space so local distances are comparable within that year.
consumes: Titles and abstracts from yearly venue corpora
outputs: Yearly concept vectors and pairwise distances

label: 2. Build filtration
explanation: Increase a distance threshold gradually so simplices appear in order from local proximity to broader connected structure.

label: 3. Extract persistent H1 loops
explanation: Identify loop-like structures that persist before being filled by higher-order simplices.

label: 4. Reconstruct representative cycles
explanation: Produce readable cycle paths around each birth edge to support interpretive inspection.
consumes: Persistent H1 generators and neighborhood graph

label: 5. Summarize yearly structure
explanation: Aggregate local and meso signals into yearly descriptors of unresolved boundaries versus closure tendencies.
